title: Classic American Pilaf
description: A simple and flavorful pilaf dish made with rice and spices, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Arabic rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the pilaf and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff with a fork and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
